headers.value: X-CSRF-Token, X-Requested-With, Accept, Accept-Version, Content-Length, Content-MD5, Content-Type, Date, X-Api-Version, Authorization

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://*.pollinations.ai; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.render.com https://*.pollinations.ai https://*.cloudinary.com;
